name: Aqua's Utils
description: A toolbox plugin: surfaces extension errors as toasts/tray, and launches & manages a local or remote FlareSolverr for Cloudflare-protected sites.
author: aquaryuo

networkAccess.reasoning: Reads the local Seanime log API (loopback) to collect reported extension errors; talks to a local or user-configured remote FlareSolverr to manage sessions; and downloads the FlareSolverr release from GitHub for the no-Docker binary mode.

commandScopes.description: Start/stop the local FlareSolverr container (Docker mode).
Launch the downloaded FlareSolverr binary on Linux/macOS (Binary mode).
Launch the downloaded FlareSolverr binary on Windows (Binary mode).
